title: Preschools * Migrants - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > Preschools * Migrants 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disabilities Issues Migrants Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FIND CHILDCARE OREGON FIND CHILD CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families locate child care through referrals and provides resources to help make informed decisions about child care needs. 211info is available to provide families referrals to support their child care search, or families can conduct their own search on the website. Website Eligibility: Parents/caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
